dailyNews.description: The escalating conflict involving US, Israel and Iran have pushed jet fuel prices higher and airlines' operations have also been disrupted due to the airspace curbs in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Danes vote as Mette Frederiksen seeks third term as PM
dailyNews.description: Frederiksen enjoyed a surge in popularity for standing up to the US over Greenland but her support is down on 2022.

dailyNews.title: Iran Arrests 466 Over Online Activities Amid War With US And Israel
dailyNews.description: Iranian authorities have arrested more than hundreds over online activities that they consider to sow "propaganda in favour of the enemy".

dailyNews.title: Kermit Gosnell, found guilty of murdering infants at Philadelphia abortion clinic, is dead at 85
dailyNews.description: Kermit Gosnell, convicted of murdering three babies born alive at his Philadelphia abortion clinic, has died at 85 while serving multiple life sentences.

dailyNews.title: Cornyn targets lawmakers’ airport fast pass as TSA lines grow during DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Cornyn's, R-Texas, bill requiring lawmakers to use standard TSA screening passed the Senate unanimously amid the ongoing Homeland Security shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Lawmakers’ airport perks in crosshairs as DHS shutdown snarls travelers, TSA
dailyNews.description: Rep. Ashley Hinson unveiled a new bill to strip lawmakers of airport perks during the shutdown as TSA agents miss paychecks and travelers face hourslong waits.

dailyNews.title: Massachusetts defends denying Catholic couple foster license even after revising gender-identity policy
dailyNews.description: Mike and Kitty Burke say Massachusetts blocked them from fostering children due to their religious faith, with a summary-judgment ruling now pending.

dailyNews.title: Afghanistan frees US citizen Dennis Coyle over a year after Taliban arrest
dailyNews.description: American academic Dennis Coyle who has was held by the Taliban in Kabul without charges since January 2025, has been released and is heading home.

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration released a national AI framework addressing safety, jobs, energy use and free speech as the U.S. seeks to stay competitive globally.

dailyNews.title: Broadcast industry CEO says consolidation is 'essential' to compete for NFL soaring media rights prices
dailyNews.description: Curtis LeGeyt, CEO of the National Association of Broadcasters, believes traditional, free-to-air broadcasters will need to consolidate to compete for live sports programming.

dailyNews.title: Colombian military plane crash kills at least 66, head of armed forces says
dailyNews.description: A Colombian military transport plane crashed near Puerto Leguizamo, Colombia, shortly after takeoff, killing at least 66 people and injuring dozens.

dailyNews.title: Democrats hammer ICE for arresting 2 at San Francisco airport
dailyNews.description: California Democrats allege excessive force after a viral video showed ICE agents detaining a crying woman at San Francisco International Airport.

dailyNews.description: President Trump once assailed the Obama administration for making cash payments to Iran. Now he supports sanctions relief that could give the country a $14 billion windfall.

dailyNews.title: Trump Sours on Keir Starmer Over UK’s Decision Not to Join Attacks on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump once called Prime Minister Keir Starmer a friend. But Britain’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran has led to merciless mocking by the president.

dailyNews.title: Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets
dailyNews.description: He was the face of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. But as he begins a retirement that was not entirely voluntary, the Border Patrol leader says he did not go far enough.

dailyNews.title: When Trump Wants Something Done, He Dispatches ICE to Do It
dailyNews.description: President Trump has increasingly used Immigration and Customs Enforcement to push personal and political objectives, and on Monday sent agents to airports across the country to help deal with long security lines.

dailyNews.title: 34 Former Military Members Were Put on Deportation Track in the Past Year
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has ramped up enforcement against immigrant service members and their families in its wider crackdown.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Rubio to testify in trial of ex-Rep. accused of illegal lobbying for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. David Rivera of Florida is accused of secretly lobbying for the Venezuelan government during the first Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
dailyNews.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.

dailyNews.title: Some travelers navigate TSA wait times as long as 6 hours as ICE agents are sent to airports
dailyNews.description: In Houston, some travelers at George Bush Intercontinental Airport dealt with wait times as long as six hours amid TSA staffing shortages. Meanwhile, security lines at Atlanta's airport extended all the way outside of the terminal. The Trump administration has deployed ICE and other DHS agents to 14 U.S. airports.

dailyNews.title: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
dailyNews.description: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Emily Gregory wants to represent Trump — and his Mar-a-Lago resort — in Florida's legislature
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory is hoping to score an upset for a seat in the Florida state House representing President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: Iran Fires New Wave of Missiles Amid Trump’s Peace Talks Claims
dailyNews.description: While President Donald Trump talks of finding negotiated peace in the Middle East, Iran launched more missile attacks at Tel Aviv that damaged a residential neighborhood. The Iranian group firing those missiles, the Revolutionary Guard, dismissed Trump’s claim of diplomatic progress, saying, “contradictory behavior of the deceptive U.S. president does not distract us from the battlefield.” NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: America's wealth gap is growing, and Trump's policies are making it bigger
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has cut programs helping lower-income households while advancing policies benefiting the wealthy and corporations.
